title: Social Media Specialist
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a creative and execution-driven Social Media Specialist to manage and grow our and SME clients’ social media presence through high-quality content, strong storytelling, and consistent delivery. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys being hands-on — creating content, appearing on camera confidently, and ensuring every task is completed on time.

You will work closely with our marketing team to produce engaging social media content that supports brand awareness, lead generation, and campaign objectives.

Responsibilities

  • Plan, create, and publish social media content across platforms such as Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and LinkedIn for Techzu and SME clients

  • Create short-form video content including filming, editing, and adding motion effects for social media

  • Write clear and engaging captions, hooks, and scripts with strong copywriting fundamentals

  • Appear confidently on camera when required (talking head, voice-over, content host, or brand representative)

  • Design social media visuals and creatives such as posts, stories, and basic marketing assets

  • Apply motion graphics, effects, and transitions to enhance video content and improve performance

  • Ensure all social media tasks are executed and completed on schedule (content calendar, posting, revisions, follow-ups)

  • Work with internal stakeholders and clients to align content direction with campaign goals and brand messaging

  • Monitor content performance and recommend improvements based on engagement and results

  • Support video shoots as a video host when required, including occasional weekend shoots based on client requirements. Off-in-lieu will be provided in accordance with company policy

  • Support ad-hoc marketing tasks and creative production needs when required

Requirements (Must-Have)

  • Minimum 1 year of experience in Social Media Management / Content Creation
  • Strong ability in content creation for social media, especially short-form videos
  • Comfortable and confident in front of the camera
  • Good copywriting skills (captions, scripts, hooks, call-to-actions)
  • Able to do graphic design for social media content
  • Able to create motion graphics / effects (basic to intermediate)
  • Able to do video editing independently
  • Highly task-oriented and responsible — able to complete assigned tasks reliably and on time
  • Ability to manage multiple content projects under tight timelines
  • Good communication skills and able to work well in a team environment

Bonus (Good to Have)

  • Experience handling multiple brands or client accounts

  • Familiarity with content planning tools and social media scheduling

  • Basic understanding of marketing funnels and lead generation content

postedCompany.description: We are an IT development company passionate in delivering quality technology solutions for you and your company. We tailor solutions to your specific needs and wants. With our competitive pricing and high standards, we are sure to meet your demands.
postedCompany.name: TECHZU ICHICODE PTE. LTD.
